description_long: This is a rectangular, industrial-style table with a heavily weathered and rusted metal surface, giving it a rugged, utilitarian appearance. The tabletop is flat and broad, showing significant signs of wear, corrosion, and discoloration, suggesting long-term exposure to harsh environments. The table is supported by four sturdy metal legs, with one side featuring a set of two integrated drawers, likely for storage. The drawers are boxy and also display rust and wear, matching the distressed look of the rest of the table. The overall construction appears robust, with all visible parts made from metal, and the design is purely functional with no decorative elements. This table would be well-suited for use in urban garages, workshops, or industrial outdoor settings.
description: A large, weathered metal table with a flat, rusted surface and two integrated drawers on one side, built for industrial or urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the plain, rusted tabletop and two front legs, with no drawers visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the full tabletop, all four legs, and the two integrated drawers on the right side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back panel of the table, with no drawers or additional features visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the length of the tabletop and the solid side panel, with no drawers visible.
